title: rumex × sorkhabadensis
intro: Rumex × sorkhabadensis, also known as Persian dock or Sorkhabad dock, is a hybrid plant species within the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae) and is native to Iran. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rumex × sorkhabadensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to promote overall well-being.
